channel.title: Ai-Native on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Ai-Native on Junho Lee

item.title: How AI-Native Teams Rewrite the Engineering Playbook
item.description: AI-native teams are moving beyond simple API wrappers by embedding LLMs into their core engineering workflows and internal tools.

item.title: How a Fintech Giant Rebuilds as an AI-Native Organization
item.description: A global financial tech firm reduces headcount by 40% and replaces management hierarchies with an AI intelligence layer to build a flat, data-driven organization.
